projects.title: Copy Trading Platform for Prediction Markets
projects.description: Built a high-performance copy trading platform for prediction markets with real-time order execution and market analytics.
projects.longDescription: Developed core frontend features for thetradefox.com, a prediction market trading platform integrating Polymarket APIs for seamless market participation. Built a copy trading experience allowing users to follow and replicate trading strategies efficiently. Implemented real-time market data handling, live order placement workflows, and end-time visibility for faster trading decisions. Focused heavily on responsive UI, low-latency interactions, and trader-centric workflows to improve execution speed and usability.

projects.title: Multi-Venue Prediction Market Dashboard
projects.description: Unified trading dashboard aggregating Polymarket and Kalshi markets with leaderboard and analytics systems.
projects.longDescription: Built multiple trader-focused dashboards on thetradefox.com that aggregate prediction markets from platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi into a single unified interface. Developed advanced search and discovery flows for events and markets across venues, enabling users to analyze and place orders directly from one platform. Implemented leaderboard systems to track top traders based on trading volume and automate reward distribution logic for competitions. Worked on performance optimization, real-time updates, and scalable frontend architecture to support active trading workflows and market monitoring.

projects.title: React Component Library
projects.description: Comprehensive UI component library with 50+ reusable components including data tables, charts, filters, and responsive layouts.
projects.longDescription: Architected and built a complete React component library from the ground up, featuring data tables with sorting/filtering, interactive charts, form components, and responsive layout primitives. Designed for maximum reusability and consistency across applications.

projects.title: Fyers Trading Platform
projects.description: High-performance charting solution with TradingView SDK integration, serving 500K+ active users with real-time market data visualization.
projects.longDescription: Revamped the entire charting infrastructure of a major trading platform, implementing vanilla JavaScript optimizations that improved rendering performance by 20%. Integrated TradingView SDK for advanced charting capabilities while maintaining cross-browser compatibility.

projects.title: Portfolio Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time P&L tracking dashboard with position management, interactive charts, and comprehensive portfolio analytics.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed a comprehensive portfolio management dashboard featuring real-time profit and loss tracking, position management, and interactive data visualizations. Built with a focus on performance and user experience, handling live updates via WebSocket connections.
